text:
Makefile changed:
+LICENSE=	LGPL20
+PORTDOCS=	README
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>

Changed and refined:
 post-install:
 pkg-plist <-- no more PORTDOCS here

- Take maintainership

Generated and tested manually, tested with port test, sent with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: change, diff: ports)

How-To-Repeat: 
portlint -A
looks usual.

port test: clean
